bird.name: Chatham Islands gerygone
bird.summary: The Chatham Islands gerygone (Gerygone albofrontata), also known as the Chatham gerygone or Chatham Island warbler, is a species of bird in…

relations.subject: Chatham Islands gerygone
relations.evidence: Its natural habitat is temperate forests
relations.object_summary: 温带岛屿或山地森林生态系统。

relations.subject: Chatham Islands gerygone
relations.evidence: Although thought to be decreasing, the population numbers have not yet reduced enough to be classified as vulnerable by the IUCN and it is thus categorised as "least concern" on the red list of threatened species. Although this is the case, a recovery plan has been in place in New Zealand due to habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
